plugins.name: projectionlab
plugins.description: Read-only access to ProjectionLab financial plans via the Chrome MCP. Extracts plan settings, milestones, income, expenses, accounts, withdrawal strategies, and Monte Carlo results from the Pinia stores.

plugins.name: organon
plugins.description: Organon vault conventions for Claude — 7 description-triggered skills covering MCP write discipline, frontmatter schema, body markdown style, session discipline, Bases views, JSON Canvas cartography, and Mermaid/Excalidraw diagramming. Absorbs kepano obsidian-skills content verbatim (drift-tracked) — no runtime cascade required.
